evals.prompt: Set up a daily morning briefing that covers the top stories in Politics, Technology, Economics/Finance, and the latest research in LLM + Recommendation Systems. I want it delivered as a Word document every day at 8 AM, with brief 2-3 sentence summaries for each story. Give me 5 top items per category.
evals.expected_output: A professional Word document or HTML briefing containing 4 sections (Politics, Tech, Economics, LLM+Recs), with 5 items per section (20 total). Each item should have: title, source, date (in Month DD, YYYY format), 2-3 sentence summary, and link. Additionally, a scheduled task configured to run daily at 8 AM.

evals.prompt: I need to automate my morning routine. Create a daily briefing that pulls the top news from Politics, Technology, and Economics sections, plus the latest papers in LLM-based recommendation systems. Generate a Word document every morning at 8 AM with summaries I can read in 10 minutes. Include 5 top items from each category.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted Word document with 4 category sections, 5 items each (20 total). Each entry includes: headline, source, date, concise 2-3 sentence summary explaining the story's significance, and a clickable link. The brief should be scannable and consumable in ~10 minutes.

evals.prompt: I want to stay informed across multiple domains without spending too much time. Can you set up a system that every morning at 8 AM generates a briefing with the top developments in politics, tech news, financial markets, and new LLM research relevant to recommendation systems? Format it as a Word document with clear sections and links. I want comprehensive coverage so give me 5 items from each category.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive Word document briefing with: clear timestamp, 4 distinct sections (Politics, Technology, Economics/Finance, LLM x Recommendations), 5 top items per section (20 total), proper formatting with category headers, consistent source attribution, publication dates, digestible summaries, and direct links. Accompanied by a scheduled daily task at 8 AM.
